title: Gear Fourth Presses Doflamingo — Part 2
description: Boundman dominates the battlefield, but Doflamingo’s endurance keeps Dressrosa in danger.
scene: On pages 10–14, Luffy, Doflamingo, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law, Trebol move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the house was that I was in the morning. I was so happy to see the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I still don't get the point of being so bouncy.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Geez. This isn't even funny anymore. Fufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I thought you had some crazy ace up your sleeve, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You just used the elasticity of rubber to get bouncier!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: For two years, I fought wild beasts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: To pound them into submission, this size and this elasticity were neces- sary.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What the ...his fist sunk into his body...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: He just came flying down out of the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: I'd like to ask the same damn question...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There isn't anywhere to go! The bird cage is com- ing from that way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Central District, huh... That's one helluva recoil...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: He can use his elasticity to fly, too!?

summary: This part focuses on gear fourth presses doflamingo, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
